---
title: "BiocExecute"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{BiocExecute}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(BiocExecute)
```

# Motivation

FAIR

+ for devs

+ for users

Use cases

# How to create executable

## Create a script

### Exec

### Describe Rapp fields (description, parameters)


## Create a install function

-> Using Rapp:::install_pkg_cli_apps

## Explain the installation process to the user


#
